task_completion.description: Verify that a new item of type 'Book Section' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand metadata pane of Jurism, the 'Item Type' field should display 'Book Section'.

task_completion.description: Verify the title of the book section is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' field in the right-hand pane should contain exactly 'Natural Law: The Modern Tradition'.

task_completion.description: Verify the author is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The creator field set to 'Author' should contain 'Bix, Brian H.' or 'Brian H. Bix'.

task_completion.description: Verify the book title is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Book Title' field should contain exactly 'The Oxford Handbook of Jurisprudence and Philosophy of Law'.

task_completion.description: Verify the editors are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There should be two creator fields set to 'Editor' containing 'Coleman, Jules' and 'Shapiro, Scott'.

task_completion.description: Verify the publisher and publication date are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Publisher' field should contain 'Oxford University Press' and the 'Date' field should contain '2002'.

task_completion.description: Verify the page range is entered correctly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Jurism graphical user interface to create the entry.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Jurism application window with its standard three-pane layout (library on left, item list in middle, metadata on right).

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show sqlite3 commands or scripts directly modifying the Jurism/Zotero database.

integrity.description: Verify the metadata was entered into the actual application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text must be visible inside the specific input boxes of the Jurism right-hand metadata pane, not just typed into a generic text editor or notes application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target item is a 'Book Section' titled 'Natural Law: The Modern Tradition' by Brian H. Bix. It is published in 'The Oxford Handbook of Jurisprudence and Philosophy of Law' (Oxford University Press, 2002), pages 61-103. The editors are Jules Coleman and Scott Shapiro. All these details must be entered into their respective fields in the Jurism metadata pane.
